introSection: Super 8 was a steel roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden. It was a small portable roller coaster built by Schwarzkopf. After it was taken down, the Super 8 was sold to the Netherlands and replaced by the Lisebergs Loopen.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars featured German car company Audi branding.

fullText:
Super 8 was a steel roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden. It was a small portable roller coaster built by Schwarzkopf. After it was taken down, the Super 8 was sold to the Netherlands and replaced by the Lisebergs Loopen.



The cars featured German car company Audi branding.


 * Super 8 on Lisepedia (Swedish)
